calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made. The petition was denied.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Rich Lee.

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2007 Continued To Dec-03-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Adam Wallach in Pro Per. Jennifer Siewert in Pro Per.

The Court informed the parties that the petition could not be granted without a marriage license. The matter was continued to December 3, 2007 so that the Court may speak to the research attorneys in family law. The parties were requested to file a declaration from the person performing the ceremony with proof of her authority to perform marriages in California.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Mizota.
